hero.title: Architectural Renovation in Patras
hero.subtitle: Transforming residences through structure, light, and materials.

trust.title: Reliability & Quality
trust.text: With an emphasis on detail and premium materials, we deliver projects that stand the test of time. Serving Patras and surrounding areas (up to 30 km).

step1.title: 1. Site Evaluation
step1.text: We visit your property for a full assessment of its needs and potential.

step2.title: 2. Architectural Proposal
step2.text: We design the optimal solution based on your budget and aesthetics, presenting 3D visualizations.

step3.title: 3. Implementation & Construction
step3.text: We undertake the full execution of the project with specialized crews and continuous supervision.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: See how we transform spaces, combining functionality and aesthetic excellence.

about.title: About Us
about.content: CUBICS is a leading renovation company in Patras. We focus on premium residential projects, offering high-quality services.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form to discuss your project needs.

buttons.success: Your request has been sent successfully!
